---
title: "BMvisualizing"
format: html
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
---
###Loading libraries
```{r Loading Libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)
library(Matrix)
library(ggplot2)
library(hdf5r)
library(SeuratData)
library(ggrepel)
library(tidyverse)
```

###Loading objects
```{r Loading Objects}
#Setting working directory
setwd("~/Forskning/Neuroblastoma Met/BM Publication/")

#Loading objects
UnintegratedMerged <-readRDS("Från Gustav/Doublet-Removed Merged BM Object.rds")
IntegratedObject <- readRDS("Från Gustav/Integrated Seurat Object.rds")
MetaData <- readRDS("Från Gustav/Seurat Object Metadata.rds")

#Loading DE results
MastResult <- readRDS("Från Gustav/MAST Random Intercept Result.rds")
EdgeRResult <- readRDS("Från Gustav/Edge R Result.rds")
```

###Visualizing Data
```{r Volcplot MAST}

```

```{r Volcplot EdgeR}

```

```{r Comparing MAST and EdgeR log2-fold change}

```

```{r Comparing MAST and EdgeR p-value}

```

```{r Size of groups}
#Adding grouped metadata for easier plotting
IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n_Tissue <- paste(IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n, IntegratedObject$Tissue, sep = "_")
IntegratedObject$Mouse_n_Tissue <- paste(IntegratedObject$Mouse_n, IntegratedObject$Tissue, sep = "_")

#Checking group sizes
table(IntegratedObject$Tissue)
table(IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n_Tissue)
table(IntegratedObject$Mouse_n_Tissue)
```

```{r Visualizing the integration}
wrap_plots(
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.cca", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("CCA Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("Harmony Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.merged", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("non-integrated Merged Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.cca", group.by = "Tissue") + ggtitle("CCA Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "Tissue") + ggtitle("Harmony Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.merged", group.by = "Tissue") + ggtitle("non-integrated Merged Object"),
  ncol = 3
)
```

```{r Visualizing Object}
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", split.by = "Mouse_n", ncol = 3)
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", split.by = "Cell_Line_n", ncol = 3)
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "Mouse_n", split.by = "Cell_Line_n", ncol = 3)
```

###Finding Clusters
```{r Clustering With different resolutions}
#Clustering with res 0.9
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.9)
ClustRes09 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.9")

#0.8
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.8)
ClustRes08 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.8")

#0.7
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.7)
ClustRes07 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.7")

#0.6
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.6)
ClustRes06 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.6")

#0.5
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.5)
ClustRes05 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.5")

#0.4
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.4)
ClustRes04 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.4")

#0.3
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.3)
ClustRes03 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.3")

#0.2
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.2)
ClustRes02 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.2")

#0.1
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.1)
ClustRes01 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.1")

#Visualizing clusters with different resolutions
wrap_plots(
  ClustRes09, ClustRes08, ClustRes07, ClustRes06, ClustRes05, ClustRes04, ClustRes03, ClustRes02, ClustRes01,
  ncol = 3
)
```

```{r Finding clusters with smaller resolutions}
#Finding clusters with smaller resolutions
#0.2
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.2)
ClustRes20 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.2")

#0.18
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.18)
ClustRes18 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.18")

#0.16
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.16)
ClustRes16 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.16")

#0.14
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.14)
ClustRes14 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.14")

#0.12
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.12)
ClustRes12 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.12")

#0.10
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.10)
ClustRes10 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.10")

#0.08
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.08)
ClustRes08 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.08")

#0.06
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.06)
ClustRes06 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.06")

#0.04
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.04)
ClustRes04 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.04")

#Visualizing clusters with different resolutions
wrap_plots(
  ClustRes20, ClustRes18, ClustRes16, ClustRes14, ClustRes12, ClustRes10, ClustRes08, ClustRes06, ClustRes04,
  ncol = 3
)

```
```{r Nbr of clusters at different resolutions}
#Tar tid och redan kört, behöver ej köras om
#resList <- list()
##loop from 0.01 to 1.0 with 0.01 increments
#for (res in seq(0.01, 1.0, by = 0.01)) {
#  #Find neighbors and clusters
#  IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = #1:30)
#  IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = res)
#  
#  #Count number of clusters
#  clustnbr <- length(unique(IntegratedObject$seurat_clusters))
#  
#  #Add number of clusters to list
#  resList[[as.character(res)]] <- clustnbr
#}

saveRDS(resList, "Number of clusters at different resolutions.rds")
resList <- readRDS("Number of clusters at different resolutions.rds")

#Ggplot of changes in cluster number with different resolutions
resDF <- data.frame(Resolution = as.numeric(names(resList)), ClusterNumber = unlist(resList))
ggplot(resDF, aes(x = Resolution, y = ClusterNumber)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Number of Clusters at Different Resolutions") +
  xlab("Resolution") +
  ylab("Number of Clusters") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r Setting resolution, watching results}
#13 cluster at res 0.15 seem to be a good choice
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.15)
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", split.by = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 4) + ggtitle("Resolution 0.15")
```

###Identify cluster markers
```{r}

```

###Checking Mesenchymal and Adrenergic markers
```{r}

```

###Checking BM markers in PT
```{r}

```
